name: InterGenOS No Overview at Startup
description: Suppresses the GNOME activities overview at every session startup. Subscribes to Main.layoutManager 'startup-complete' + invokes Main.overview.hide(). Operator-direct fleet-default behavior per 2026-05-21T~01:Z. Pairs with intergen-firstboot@intergenos.org. Default-enabled via the intergenos-default-settings gschema-override per D-006.
